title: Indulgent Smoky Canadian Corn Flatbread
description: A quick, smoky flatbread filled with corn and mozzarella that can be finished in one pan and is FODMAP friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl whisk together the masa harina, all‑purpose flour, smoked paprika, oregano, and sea salt.
Add the olive oil and corn kernels, then stir until the mixture is moist but not wet.
Fold in the shredded mozzarella until evenly distributed.
Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium heat and lightly oil the surface.
Pour the batter into the skillet, forming a flat circle, and cook for 4–5 minutes on each side until golden brown and cooked through.
Remove from the skillet, let rest for a minute, slice into wedges, and serve warm.

axes.primaryIngredient: corn arepa filled with mozarella cheese
